task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the ATel alert text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '~/Documents/atel_alert.txt' with information about the TeV flare from Markarian 421.

task_completion.description: Verify that the telescope is pointed at the correct target (Markarian 421).
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map shows the telescope crosshairs on Markarian 421, or the Ekos Mount module displays target coordinates around RA 11h 04m, Dec +38d 12m.

task_completion.description: Verify that the photometric sequence is configured with the correct filters, exposure times, and frame counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture module's sequence queue contains jobs for B, V, and R filters. B should have 120s exposure, V and R should have 60s exposure. Each filter should have a count of at least 5.

task_completion.description: Verify that a false-color 'heat' palette sky view image is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or KStars FITS Viewer displaying a sky image with a 'heat' or false-color palette applied, or a file manager showing the saved image file.

task_completion.description: Verify that an optical counterpart report is drafted and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with a drafted report about the optical counterpart of the blazar, saved as 'optical_counterpart_report.txt' in the Documents directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the telescope and capture sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the KStars and Ekos graphical interfaces, rather than using command-line scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the false-color image is generated from captured data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The false-color image is generated using the FITS Viewer or image processing tools within the environment, not downloaded from a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the report is genuinely drafted by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is typed out in a text editor and contains relevant information about the observation, rather than being a pre-existing file that was just moved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Markarian 421 (RA 11h 04m 27s / 11.074h, Dec +38d 12m 31s / 38.208d). Required Filters: B (slot 3), V (slot 2), R (slot 4). Expected Exposures: B=120s, V=60s, R=60s. Minimum frames per filter: 5. Outputs: A false-color 'heat' palette sky view image and an optical counterpart report saved in ~/Documents/.
